title: Twin Ion Engine starfighter

The [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] '''Twin Ion Engine (T.I.E.) starfighter''' was the forerunner of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE starfighter]] and its [[TIE series/Legends|variants]].<ref name="TSWS" /><ref name="TSWS2" />

==Characteristics==
The T.I.E. [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was the first fighter to utilize the famous "ball-shaped cockpit flanked by vertical wings" design, and seemed very similar in terms of shape to its descendants.<ref name="TSWS" />

==History==
The T.I.E. could be traced back to a courier design produced by [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar's]] [[Sienar Design Systems/Legends|Sienar Design Systems]] before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the ship which became [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']]<ref name="EGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>—although ''Scimitar'' was a large, sophisticated runner rather than a compact, mass-produced starfighter.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> The next stage was the [[Advanced Project ship]], a starfighter prototype design, the latest and smallest of which Sienar was building in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>

[[File:RaithSienar-HN531.jpg|thumb|left|[[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] reveals the [[SIE-TIE twin ion engine|SIE-TIE]] engine design to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the radical [[Twin ion engine/Legends|propulsion system]] around which the T.I.E. [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] would soon be built.]]

It would be another seven years, however, before Sienar revealed the final component of the T.I.E. design, the [[SIE-TIE twin ion engine]], a powerful and highly-innovative propulsion unit which was officially endorsed by Republic Sienar Systems shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] and the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN51">''{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|business/13411_1.html|Successful Engine Tests Cause Sienar Stock Surge}}''</ref> This paved the way for the final starfighter design, and it meant that Republic Sienar Systems was well-prepared when the Republic called for a new, standard mass-production starfighter during the Clone Wars.<ref name="TSWS" />

The T.I.E. production went underway as part of a drive by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] to standardize their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] capability and create fighters that could deploy in the limited space available aboard existing [[Warship/Legends|warships]] like the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class]] and [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]].<ref name="AJ10" />

Although the new engine design was incompatible with established [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], life-support and shield systems, the T.I.E. was incredibly cheap, very fast, and could stack tightly in converted cargo holds or external launch-racks aboard the Navy's existing line-combat ships.<ref name="AJ10" /> By this time, the original T.I.E. had evolved into the [[TIE starfighter]], which would later be supplanted by the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]], the dominant starfighter model of the Galactic Empire.<ref name="SW:TRG" /><ref name="AJ10" />
